plan.title: Your plan and membership
plan.subtitle: Manage your plan, export data, and when available, billing from here.
plan.exportDescription: Download an Excel file with your products, inventory by branch, and sales from the last year (up to 100 sales). Useful as backup or to analyze in a spreadsheet.
plan.trialEnded: Your trial has ended. Choose a plan to keep using GIRO.
plan.trialEndingSoon: Your trial is ending soon. Choose a plan to keep using GIRO.
plan.paymentComing: Soon you'll be able to add your card and subscribe from here.
plan.freeDescription: Always free. Ideal to try or for a single location.
plan.proDescription: More branches, advanced reports and priority support.
plan.entDescription: Custom for large teams. Billing and integrations.

landing.heroTitle: Stock and sales management for your business
landing.heroSubtitle: GIRO is a system to manage inventory, point of sale and branches in one place. Built for stores, shops and small businesses.
landing.heroStart: Get started in minutes: create your company, add products and sell.
landing.ctaFree: 3 months free. No card required to start.
landing.feature1Desc: Stock per location, low-stock alerts and barcodes for labels.
landing.feature2Desc: Fast POS: search by name, SKU or barcode; pay by cash, card or mixed.
landing.feature3Desc: Multiple locations and movements between them with history.
landing.feature4Desc: Sales by period, by payment method, top products and comparisons.
landing.feature5Desc: Owner, manager or seller: control who sees reports and who only sells.
landing.pwaNote: Installable on your phone (PWA) and option to export your data to Excel.
landing.whyDesc: Simple, in Spanish and straightforward. Built for SMBs and small businesses that want to control stock and sales in one place.
landing.whyTagline: Control stock and sales in one place.
landing.footerTagline: GIRO — Simple management for your business

branches.subtitle: Locations where you sell and keep stock.
branches.tooltip: Each branch has its own inventory; you can transfer between them
branches.name: Name
branches.deleteConfirm: Delete this branch? This cannot be undone.
branches.noBranches: No branches. Create one to get started.
branches.deleteBranchMessage: Are you sure you want to delete branch {{name}} ({{code}})? It will no longer appear in lists and you won't be able to assign sales or stock to it.

users.subtitle: Users who can access your company.
users.requiredFields: Username, password and name are required.
users.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
users.deleteConfirm: Delete this user? They will not be able to sign in again.
users.tooltipCreate: Owner and Manager can manage branches and users; Seller only sales and inventory
users.subtitleLong: Who can use the system and with what permissions.
users.deleteUserMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}} ({{username}})? The user will be deactivated and will not be able to sign in.
users.newPasswordLabel: New password (leave blank to keep current)

transfers.subtitle: Stock movements between branches.
transfers.addItemHint: Add at least one item with variant and quantity.
transfers.subtitleLong: Move stock from one branch to another.
transfers.tooltipCreate: Choose origin, destination and items; stock is deducted when completed
transfers.completeSectionTooltip: When the transfer arrives at destination, enter the ID and complete it to update stock
